para_trans: 02. Period of appointment, travel allowance, as per Government rules, to teachers transferred for administrative reasons.
Daily allowance will be admissible. Recruiting period, travel allowance and daily allowance are admissible to the faculty who have been transferred on request.
It won't stay.
The said orders shall come into force with immediate effect.
4. Strictly follow the instructions given below for immediate and efficient execution of transfer order.
be followed.
1) Immediately after the transfer order is issued, the faculty concerned shall be transferred from the institution in which they are presently working.
Join the organization after their transfer. Alternate faculty / officers were also present by the Head of the Institute / Office.
Without waiting for it to happen, the transferred faculty / officer should be relieved immediately.
The faculty concerned has served in the Maharashtra Civil Service (term of office, non-self-service and suspension, dismissal and demotion from service).
at the time of assumption of office as prescribed under the Provisions for Removal) Rules, 1981,
Care should be taken to join the institution / office assigned to the transferor. Otherwise, their absence.
The expiration date will be counted as a non-deceiving day.
2) The principals of the institution concerned should recruit the faculty who have come to join the institution without any delay.
Salaries and allowances without work as a mandatory waiting period for not hiring a teacher
In the event of a payout, the principal of the institution concerned will be held responsible.
3) Director of Technical Education against the head of the institution / office concerned if the teacher is not relieved.
The Directorate should take administrative action in a timely manner and the proposal should be approved by the Government as and when required.
be submitted.
